A function to determine the status of a number as prime or composite can be written using modulus. * * *  
The function checks if a number is divisible by any integer other than 1 and itself. *  
The result is either "prime" or "composite" based on the modulus operation. * * *  
The function uses modulus to determine if a number is divisible by any number other than 1 and itself. *  
The result is either "prime" or "composite" based on the modulus operation. * * *  
The function returns "prime" if no divisors are found and "composite" otherwise. *  
The status is determined by checking for divisibility using the modulus operator. *
